mapper.select:
SELECT LEAGUE_IDX, LEAGUE_NAME, LEAGUE_LOCATION, LEAGUE_CONTENT FROM LEAGUE
AND LOWER(LEAGUE_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(LEAGUE_LOCATION) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY LEAGUE_IDX ASC OFFSET #{ offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{ numOfRows} ROWS ONLY
SELECT LEAGUE_IDX, LEAGUE_NAME, LEAGUE_LOCATION, LEAGUE_CONTENT FROM LEAGUE WHERE LEAGUE_IDX = #{league_idx}

SELECT G.GAME_IDX AS "game_idx", G.LEAGUE_IDX AS "league_idx", G.GAME_DATE AS "game_date", G.GAME_TIME AS "game_time", G.GAME_FIELD AS "game_field", HT.TEAM_NAME AS "home_team_name", AT.TEAM_NAME AS "away_team_name" FROM SBN.GAME G LEFT JOIN SBN.TEAM HT ON G.HOME_IDX = HT.TEAM_IDX LEFT JOIN SBN.TEAM AT ON G.AWAY_IDX = AT.TEAM_IDX WHERE G.LEAGUE_IDX = #{league_idx} ORDER BY G.GAME_DATE ASC

SELECT T.TEAM_IDX AS "team_idx", T.TEAM_NAME AS "team_name" FROM SBN.TEAM T INNER JOIN SBN.TEAM_LEAGUE TL ON T.TEAM_IDX = TL.TEAM_IDX WHERE TL.LEAGUE_IDX = #{league_idx} AND TL.JOIN_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY T.TEAM_IDX ASC

SELECT T.TEAM_IDX AS "team_idx", T.TEAM_NAME AS "team_name", M.MEMBER_NAME AS "manager_name", T.TEAM_LOCATION AS "team_location", NVL(SUB_MT.CNT, 0) AS "number_of_members" FROM SBN.TEAM_LEAGUE TL INNER JOIN SBN.TEAM T ON TL.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX LEFT JOIN SBN.MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEAM_IDX, COUNT(MEMBER_IDX) AS CNT FROM SBN.MEMBER_TEAM GROUP BY TEAM_IDX ) SUB_MT ON T.TEAM_IDX = SUB_MT.TEAM_IDX WHERE TL.LEAGUE_IDX = #{league_idx} AND TL.JOIN_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY T.TEAM_IDX ASC
SELECT T.TEAM_IDX AS "team_idx", T.TEAM_NAME AS "team_name" FROM SBN.TEAM T WHERE T.TEAM_MANAGER = #{memberIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SBN.TEAM_LEAGUE ( LEAGUE_IDX, TEAM_IDX, JOIN_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{league_idx}, #{team_idx}, 0 )
